  "findings": [
    "Missing drip loop at the service entrance conductors",
    "Water can migrate down the service conductors into the service equipment"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Form proper drip loops on the service conductors below the level of the service head",
    "Ensure conductors are brought out of the service head through bushed holes"
  ],
  "rationale": "The service entrance conductors lack the required drip loops. According to NEC Article 230, drip loops must be formed to prevent moisture from entering the service raceway or equipment, posing a severe water intrusion and electrical hazard.",

    "NEC Article 230.54(F)",
    "NEC Article 230.54(G)"
  ]
